title: Merger of Infosys Step-Down Subsidiaries in Romania Completed
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that the merger of two wholly owned step-down subsidiaries in Romania, In-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania and ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania, was completed on January 8, 2026. The resultant entity is named In-tech Engineering S.R.L. No financial impact, consideration, or business impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: The merger between two wholly owned step down subsidiaries, In-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania and ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania, was completed on January 8, 2026.
The name of the resultant entity is In-tech Engineering S.R.L.
